polyglottooltip.configuration.title: PolyglotTooltip
polyglottooltip.configuration.displayLan: Enter language codes here to show item names in additional languages.
polyglottooltip.configuration.alwaysShow: Show them even when an additional language matches the current game language.
polyglottooltip.configuration.enableChin: Allow searches to match both Simplified and Traditional Chinese.
polyglottooltip.configuration.tooltipSec: Legacy format codes for secondary-language names in normal tooltips, such as &7 or &7&l.
polyglottooltip.configuration.jadeSecond: Legacy format codes for secondary-language names in Jade, such as &7 or &7&l.
